content.en:
Ye Tian naturally found out about this problem, but it had nothing to do with him.

He had already perfected the Infinite Diagram to meet the standard, but as long as he didn't reveal it, he wouldn't be sent to the fourth layer.

"There are a lot of high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have been eliminated in the third layer, I'm afraid there are not many high-level immeasurable lifeforms that can enter the fourth layer of the ruins stone tower!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the entire Xuanqi Territory is too big, and there may not be many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in one territory, but there are more than a few high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have come here, even if the high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the distant territory get the news, I am afraid that they will rush to come.

Therefore, no matter how difficult the third layer of the Ruins Stone Tower is, there will still be a steady stream of high-level immeasurable lifeforms coming.

Therefore, there will be no shortage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms entering the fourth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's perfection of the Incomplete Immeasurable Graph became better and better, but because he did not have the entire Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram, he could never completely perfect it, and could only improve it to the limit as much as possible.

He was going to collect the nine immeasurable maps of the ruins stone tower, and then combine the nine immeasurable maps to refine them again, so that he could perfect the complete immeasurable map.

It's been another time.

Ye Tian didn't know how many cultivation experiments he had conducted, but the results were remarkable, and he finally allowed him to perfect this one-ninth incomplete immeasurable diagram to the extreme.

Immediately, Ye Tian showed this perfect one-ninth incomplete diagram, which was collected by the ruins stone tower.

Airplanes!

A reward fell on Ye Tian.

This reward was a ray of light, which was directly integrated into Ye Tian's body, so other high-level immeasurable lifeforms saw it, and they didn't know what it was.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

What the Ruins Stone Tower gave him was the one-ninth of the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram just now, but this was the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram inheritance that could be spread.

The previous incomplete immeasurable diagram can only be comprehended by oneself, and it is also temporary, if it cannot be perfected within the specified time, the incomplete immeasurable diagram will disappear.

But this immeasurable map can be preserved forever, as a foundation of power.

Although the other Great Ancestors did not dare to practice this Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram, they also gained a lot from comprehending the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram, and maybe they could create an inferior immeasurable body from it!

It can be said that this incomplete immeasurable map inheritance alone is not compared with ordinary resources, but a symbol of the heritage of a top power.

And now, Ye Tian has directly obtained this inheritance.

"If you gather the inheritance of the nine incomplete immeasurable diagrams, then the inheritance of the incomplete immeasurable diagram of the ruins stone tower will be collected, and it will be easier to completely complete it when the time comes!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian was selected by a pillar of light, and instantly entered the fourth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

The fourth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower was a mountain in the void, and a high-level immeasurable lifeform was inside this mountain at this moment.

And on top of the mountain peaks, there are stone tablets, each of which is inscribed with a picture.

"Infinite Chart!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

But soon, he saw that the immeasurable diagram on the stele was a natural inscription and could not be imprinted, and the stele was integrated with the entire ruins of the stone tower and could not be taken away.

As a result, many high-level immeasurable lifeforms can only be contemplated, but cannot be taken away.

At the same time, Ye Tian also received a message from the Ruined Stone Tower.

On the fourth floor, if you want to get benefits, you must perfect the immeasurable diagrams contained in these stone tablets to the extent that they meet the standards of the ruins stone towers.

It can be said that the difficulty of this level is much higher than that of the third level.

In addition, the immeasurable will can only really peek into the immeasurable diagram when it enters the stone tablet, and after the immeasurable will is ejected, the immeasurable diagram must be perfected to the extent that it meets the standard.

If you fail once, you will be kicked out.

"In this way, on the fourth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower, I can directly peek into all the incomplete immeasurable diagrams. I just need to complete all these infinite graphs here, and then I can get a complete infinite graph!"

Ye Tian was quite excited in his heart.

However, in this way, the inheritance value of the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram he obtained on the third layer of the Ruins Stone Tower dropped significantly.

Of course, he can sell it to other forces if he doesn't need it carefully, and there will definitely be many forces willing to buy it at a big price.

The immeasurable diagram inheritance bred by this kind of ruins cannot be copied by oneself, and can only be given through the ruins or snatched from the ruins, a unique treasure.

Therefore, its value is only a little lower for him, but it is not reduced at all for other forces.

"Let's start with this stone tablet!"

Ye Tian came to a stone tablet on the side of the Blood Ancestor and began to comprehend.

Although they are all comprehending the same stone tablet, after each high-level immeasurable life form immeasurable will enters, the void they actually enter is not the same, and they will not interfere with each other.

......

"It's about the same as the immeasurable diagram given by the third layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, it's one ninth. The third layer of the Ruins Stone Pagoda is only a great ancestor who is only screened and has the ability to perfect the immeasurable map, so he is qualified to enter the fourth layer to improve the other parts of the immeasurable map!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he still used the old method of using the copy of the body to practice the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram, so as to perfect the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram.

And because Ye Tian found the law before, the speed of improvement this time is faster and the efficiency is higher.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally completely perfected this second incomplete immeasurable map.

But only two incomplete maps still can't be combined.

"Let's go to the second stele!"

Ye Tian walked to the second stone tablet and continued to comprehend.

At this time, there were already several high-level immeasurable lifeforms that had perfected several immeasurable diagrams, but they were not completely perfected, they were only perfected a little bit, which met the standards of the Ruins Stone Tower, and compared with Ye Tian's thorough perfection, it was a thousand times worse, or even more.

In this way, Ye Tian perfected this Gate Immeasurable Diagram at an extremely slow speed in the eyes of other Great Ancestors, but the intelligent high-level Immeasurable Lifeforms were afraid that they had already seen the clues.

After all, Ye Tian really spent so many years on a stone tablet and didn't meet the standards, and he was kicked out a long time ago.

Obviously, Ye Tian has long been perfect enough to meet the standards, but he is still improving, so that he will not be kicked out.

But this has nothing to do with other high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they don't care much about it.
